translations.en: Structural Particle: most often used for modifying nouns
Prefix for ordinal numbers, e.g. first（第一 dì yī）, second（第二 dì èr ） etc
to put / to release / to let go
What to do / What are you doing?
measure word(classifier for people or objects in general)
to meet / to see each other
as soon as / right away / then
particle (indicates the completion of an action or a change of state, etc)
a fractional unit of money in China1 毛 = 10 cents
to not have / there is no
plural markere.g. 朋友们 péng you men (friends)，老师们 lǎo shī men (teachers)
get on (a bus, train, car etc)
internet friend / friend on the internet
below / down / go down / get off
primary school student  / elementary school student
a moment / a little while / in a moment
(used after a verb) give it a go / to do (sth for a bit to give it a try)
particle: in process of(indicating action in progress)
in process of (doing sth) / just at (that time) / right in (that place)
noun suffixe.g. 桌子 zhuō zi (table) 椅子 yǐ zi (chair)
